title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at More Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at More Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the More Retail family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
